materialChanges: Reframed both fictional quantitative cases around explicit large-effect claims, prespecified diagnostic thresholds, and 95% intervals so conclusions no longer rely on bare point-estimate differences.

Connected each new-data estimate to the corresponding same-data sensitivity range while explaining that numerical overlap does not make replication and sensitivity analysis interchangeable or identify a combined effect size.
Added and visibly sourced the researcher-flexibility and selective-reporting claim in the opening scene, with the corresponding claims-ledger and reference-use updates.
Reclassified What is replication? as an other-type commissioned Perspective that was not externally peer reviewed.
Reduced the lesson and scene pacing estimate from 150 to 75 minutes without changing lesson identity, version, status, objectives, or outcome mapping.
Updated attribution to disclose this single post-review finalization run and its material-instructions digest.

reviewDispositions.rationale: The worked seedling case and materials assessment now define the exact large-effect claim before results, state a prespecified replication criterion, supply 95% intervals, and require conclusions to depend on precision, study quality, and wider evidence rather than bare point estimates. The answer logic, acceptable responses, common errors, and rubric were updated consistently.

A new claim-researcher-flexibility-bias record maps the outcome-informed choice and selective-reporting chain to scene-result-trail and source-multiverse-analysis; the same-scene source note now names both the claim and source, and the source-use record states the bounded evidentiary use.
references.json now classifies source-replication-perspective as other and records that it is a commissioned Perspective that was not externally peer reviewed in the version and locator fields.

This note confirms the accuracy of the remaining terminology, safeguard boundaries, mappings, diagram, calculations, and fictional-data labels. Those elements were preserved; only wording needed for the accepted findings was changed.

The duplicated quantitative blocker is resolved by the same coherent repair applied for the academic finding: explicit claims, before-results criteria, intervals, and calibrated answer logic now prevent learners from treating a smaller bare point estimate as decisive disagreement.

The worked conclusion and assessment reasoning now point out that +0.4 cm lies within +0.2 to +1.8 cm and that 3 units lies within 2 to 13 units. They explain that the two independent safeguards converge in warning against a stable large estimate while neither establishes a shared cause or combined effect size.
lesson.json now estimates 75 minutes total, allocated 10, 15, 20, 15, and 15 minutes across the five scenes; the scene sum equals the lesson total.
This note identifies strengths rather than a requested repair. The two complete misconception-repair sequences and the equivalent diagram, table, and text routes remain intact in the final pack.

evidenceChecked: All five ordered scene files retain exactly one level-one heading, logical source order, descriptive headings, prompt-before-feedback sequencing, and a complete prose reading path.

The original declarative concept map contains alt text and a relationship-complete long description; its four relationships are also repeated in a learner-visible table and the before-inspect-new data-alternatives text map.

Assessment is untimed and retakeable, accepts text responses, and provides reasoning-rich feedback and alternate retry scenarios; no outcome depends on color, position, hover, dragging, sound, motion, speed, laboratory access, or disclosure of personal information.
The explicit accessibility and recovery sections provide prose, bullets, table, dictation, assistive-technology, print, nonvisual, and nonphysical routes that preserve the learning operation.

A static security inspection found no raw HTML, JavaScript, event handlers, remote embeds, Markdown images, unsafe active media, executable notebooks, secrets, or identifiable learner or patient records in the pack.

All seven references record factual-reference use under facts-only-original-expression, concrete rights-basis evidence, dated checked-no-agent-restriction-found access status, and public terms routes; no source is marked human-only.
lesson.json declares no third-party assets, ATTRIBUTION.md identifies the diagram and all quantitative cases as original fictional material, and no media or dataset is redistributed.
Author, review, and finalizer accountability and material agent provenance are disclosed; the finalizer run ID is distinct from the author and both review run IDs.
limitations: No live browser, screen-reader, keyboard-only, 200% zoom, narrow-viewport, reduced-motion, print, or unavailable non-web export test was performed; semantic and equivalent-access evidence was audited from source.

External source content, current terms pages, and GitHub review transport were not independently re-fetched in this restricted run; the audit relied on the complete pack records, the eligible review artifacts, and the operator-supplied statement that both GitHub reviews are non-dismissed COMMENTED submissions.

Repository schema validation, strict source preflight, and npm validation were not run because the operator expressly prohibited npm; JSON syntax and internal identity, count, timing, scene, claim, and source links were checked without npm.

The learning-design artifact lists the academic review among evidence checked, so the two advisory records should not be described as independent human judgments even though their declared roles, run IDs, providers, and model families are distinct.

rationale: The original candidate and all eight indexed findings were inspected. The two supplied standard-lesson advisory inputs target the same candidate, declare the required academic and learning-design roles, use distinct run IDs, providers, and model families, and both honestly record request-changes; no review was excluded from the operator-supplied eligible set. The bounded final revision incorporates every requested substantive repair and preserves both positive notes. The resulting lesson states diagnostic claims and uncertainty before interpreting fictional replication results, connects complementary safeguards without conflating them, restores the missing claim-evidence bridge, accurately labels the central Perspective, and sets a credible pacing estimate. The source-based accessibility-and-rights audit is satisfied with the limitations recorded above. On that evidence the content decision is merge, but this value is not permission to merge and does not claim that the pending final commit, external GitHub transport, source routes, or repository validation were independently verified in this run.
dissent: Both eligible advisory reviews returned request-changes against the original candidate; neither reviewer evaluated or approved the finalizer's revision.

The learning-design review consulted the academic review artifact, as disclosed in its evidenceChecked list, which limits any claim of isolation beyond the distinct declared run and provider metadata.
conditions: The operator must commit the final lesson content with both cited review artifacts, replace PENDING-FINAL-COMMIT with that exact 40-character commit SHA, and make no further teaching-content change after that commit.
Before merge, the operator must run the required strict source preflight and repository validation and must not proceed if either check fails.
Only the separately authorized publication transition for lesson status, source confidence, and retained claim review-status fields may follow finalization without making this adjudication stale.

adjudicator.displayName: VSBDev — accountable operator, fresh finalizer and adjudicator
